sections.paragraph:
σφυδρόν, οῦ, τό (PFlor 391, 53; 56 [III a.d.]; Hesych.) ankle Ac 3:7 (v.l. σφυρόν, q.v.; B-D-F §34, 6).—DELG s.v. σφυρόν.

PFlor PFlor = Papiri Fiorentini—List 4

Hesych Hesych , V a.d.—List 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

q.v. q.v. = quod vide (which see, see that which has just been mentioned)

B-D-F B-D-F = FBlass, ADebrunner, RFunk, A Greek Grammar of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 981
